Show / Hide Table of Contents

Class DbPerTenantStrategy

Isolation strategy: each tenant has a completely separate SQL Server/PostgreSQL database. Maximum isolation. Recommended for enterprise and regulated tenants.

Usage in Program.cs:

builder.Services.AddDbContext<AppDbContext>((sp, opts) =>
    DbPerTenantStrategy.Configure(opts, sp));

object

Methods

Configure(DbContextOptionsBuilder, IServiceProvider, Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder, string>?)

Configures a DbContextOptionsBuilder to use the current tenant's ConnectionString at runtime.

Declaration
public static void Configure(DbContextOptionsBuilder optionsBuilder, IServiceProvider serviceProvider, Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder, string>? useProvider = null)
Parameters
Type Name Description
DbContextOptionsBuilder optionsBuilder

The EF Core options builder to configure.
IServiceProvider serviceProvider

DI provider used to resolve ITenantContext.
Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder, string> useProvider

A callback that applies the database provider, e.g.: (opts, cs) => opts.UseSqlServer(cs)
